name: JUURYU NAGE: KUBIWARI OTOSHI (TEN-TON STYLE THROW: SUPER CHOKE SLAM)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 4

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 28

Components: E, Mob

This technique can only be performed if the target is your size category or smaller. You must initiate a grapple attempt as normal against the target that, if successful, deals your unarmed attack damage, as though you were one size category larger, and deals 6d6 bonus damage. You do not provoke an attack of opportunity for trying to start a grapple this way. If hit, the target is knocked unconscious for 2 rounds, though a successful Fortitude save reduces this to being staggered and losing their Dexterity bonus to Defense for 1 round instead.

If you were already grappling the target, you only need to make a successful grapple check to perform the technique successfully.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the bonus damage by 1d6, up to 10d6 total bonus damage.
